title: Dynamic Trees Addon Lib
description: An Addon Library for Dynamic Trees addon and treepacks
body:
[Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) | [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus)

![DTAddonLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ju42L8G7/images/56ae683b6e042c724d0d8e769026446ea1a3dfab.png)

![[Discord Link](https://discord.com/invite/A4FCBS3)](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)

# **Project Goal**

This is an extension of [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees). This mod aims to expand the customization of DT by adding custom gen features, growth logics, cell kits and other features to extend the way you can create a tree. This library is a collection of previously made features from different addons, such as [Dynamic Trees Biomes O Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-trees-biomes-o-plenty), [Dynamic Trees Oh the Biomes We've gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-trees-bwg), [Dynamic Trees Better End](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-for-better-end), [Dynamic Trees Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-trees-aether) and more.


# **Features**

All the features can be found on the [wiki](https://github.com/DynamicTreesTeam/DynamicTrees-AddonLib/wiki).

## Gen Features:

With gen features, you can add and modify the tree with custom features. You can add vines, randomize the leaves, add fruits and way more.
![Gen Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ju42L8G7/images/a0cc854ef1a2f520473f1a515ab95fb89ffdc256.png)

## Growth Logic kits:

Growth logic kits allow the user to change how a tree grow. You can make a tree grow diagonally, do circles, or anything like that. 
![Growth Logic Kits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ju42L8G7/images/03e85d0456f0129249edbbc3609abb01e41cb7e0.png)

## Cell kits:

Cell kits are for the leaves, how they should grow on branches. You can make them grow very large and flat, or grow like a rose.
![Cell Kits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ju42L8G7/images/88d73c75e496b796a049c5fc2b2aa859431ad2b4.png)

## Custom types:

Types allow a tree to behave in very specific ways. This part is way more complex than the others and very specific. But for basic types, you can make a tree spawn underwater, make them grow in a very specific way, and more...
![Custom Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ju42L8G7/images/a10f6e05315b9608fe6827a2949a47280ad57875.png)


# **Requirements**
This mod requires [Dynamic Trees 1.4.8+](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) to function in 1.20.1 and optionally [Dynamic Trees Plus 1.2.1+](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) for Dynamic Trees Plus related features.

# **Bugs and Issues**
Use the [issues](https://github.com/DynamicTreesTeam/DynamicTrees-AddonLib/issues) link at the top of the content section for reporting bugs. The comments section was removed because it was abused.

# **License, Permission and Modpacks**

Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to use the mod in your mod pack after I've already told you that you can, it's annoying. Attribution would be nice, but I don't require it. You are **not** allowed to re-publish this mod to other sites without providing a CurseForge/Modrinth download link and my permission.
You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an **MIT licence** and its source is public on GitHub.
